case_title: CARLOS ANTONIO ANDRA DE DEODANES et al VS. XIOMARA I. COLLINS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,239.00 FILED BY ANDRA DE DEODANES, CARLOS ANTONIO MOCTEZUMA, CLARA AMADOR AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, XIOMARA I. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,937.00 FILED BY COLLINS, XIOMARA I. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ANDRA DE DEODANES, CARLOS ANTONIO MOCTEZUMA, CLARA AMADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY ANDRA DE DEODANES, CARLOS ANTONIO MOCTEZUMA, CLARA AMADOR COLLINS, XIOMARA I.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDRA DE DEODANES, CARLOS ANTONIO MOCTEZUMA, CLARA AMADOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLINS, XIOMARA I. $2,962.39 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,047.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COLLINS, XIOMARA I. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ANDRA DE DEODANES, CARLOS ANTONIO MOCTEZUMA, CLARA AMADOR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, XIOMARA I.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDRA DE DEODANES, CARLOS ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, XIOMARA I.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
